name: Kagi (uvx)
description: Search the web with Kagi and extract page content as markdown. Provides web, news, video, podcast, and image search with optional page extracts, filters, and Kagi lenses.

inputs.label: Kagi API Key
inputs.description: API key for the Kagi Search API. Generate one in the Kagi API portal under Settings. API access uses a pay-per-use model once beta credits are exhausted.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to your Kagi account
2. Open Settings > API (the API portal)
3. Click Generate Key to create an API key
4. Copy the key and paste it here

auth.instructions: Generate a Kagi API key in the API portal at https://kagi.com/settings?p=api and set it as KAGI_API_KEY.
